description: Create a thematic map style for world population in GeoServer (admin / Admin123!). Configure an SLD style named 'population_choropleth' in the 'ne' workspace with five classification rules for the 'pop_est' attribute: < 1,000,000 (Fill #ffffb2), 1,000,000 to 10,000,000 (Fill #fecc5c), 10,000,000 to 100,000,000 (Fill #fd8d3c), 100,000,000 to 500,000,000 (Fill #f03b20), and >= 500,000,000 (Fill #bd0026), all with a gray (#999999) stroke of width 0.5. Include labels for the 'name' property (SansSerif, size 10, color #333333, halo radius 2, color #ffffff). Set this as the default style for the 'ne:ne_countries' layer and export a WMS map image to /home/ga/output/population_map.png.
